header.name: Return By Death - BP
header.description: Return By Death v1.3.0 - Re:Zero-inspired death rewind. Built on the proven working death-detection pattern (entityDie event + polling fallback). Saves player state every 20s, rewinds on death with full inventory/vitals restoration, plays the iconic RBD sound. Includes chat commands, slash commands, and RBD Notebook UI menu.
